location.description: Where the error occurred, e.g. 'body.items[3].tags' or 'path.thing-id'

value.description: The value at the given location

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.
examples: Property foo is required but is missing.

errors.description: Optional list of individual error details

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type. This value should not change between occurrences of the error.

type.description: A URI reference to human-readable documentation for the error.

bearerAuth.description: API key passed as Bearer token

info.description: Production-grade job orchestration platform for background jobs, workflows, and managed execution.
info.title: Strait API

get.description: Returns the service health status.
Returns 200 when the service is ready to accept traffic.

post.description: Attaches metadata annotations to a run for search and filtering.
Saves a checkpoint so the run can resume from this point on retry.
Marks the run as successfully completed with optional result data.
Signals that the run should continue with a new execution step.
Marks the run as failed with an error message and optional details.
Sends a heartbeat to indicate the run is still actively executing.
Records an iteration in a loop-based execution pattern.
Sends a structured log entry from the running job to Strait.

get.description: Returns all key-value pairs in persistent memory for the run's job.

delete.description: Removes a key-value pair from persistent memory.

get.description: Retrieves a value from persistent memory by key.

post.description: Stores a value in persistent memory that survives across run attempts.
Records a structured output produced by the run.

get.description: Returns the payload for a run so the SDK can begin execution.

post.description: Reports execution progress as a percentage for monitoring.
Saves a point-in-time snapshot of resource utilization.
Reports CPU, memory, and other resource utilization during execution.
Spawns a child run from within the current run for fan-out patterns.

get.description: Returns all key-value pairs in the run's state store.

post.description: Sets a key-value pair in the run's state store.

delete.description: Removes a key-value pair from the run's state store.

get.description: Returns a specific value from the run's state store by key.

post.description: Sends a streaming chunk for real-time output from LLM-powered runs.
Records an LLM tool call for observability and debugging.
Reports resource usage (tokens, compute time, etc.) for billing.
Pauses the run until an external event with the specified key is received.

get.description: Admin-only paginated listing of dead-letter runs with optional job_id and masked filters.

post.description: Hard-deletes a dead-letter run. Requires the dlq:purge scope.
Re-enqueues a dead-letter run via the admin path and records an audit event. Requires the dlq:replay scope.
Clears visible_until on a dead-letter run so it is no longer hidden by the age-out masker. Requires the dlq:replay scope.

get.description: Returns statistics about workflow approval steps including wait times.
Returns compute resource utilization and cost breakdown.
Returns actionable insights for reducing costs based on usage patterns.
Returns cost analytics for the current billing period.
Returns cost breakdown grouped by machine/compute type.
Returns cost breakdown grouped by trigger type.
Returns projected costs based on historical usage trends.
Returns the jobs contributing most to overall costs.
Returns cost trend data over time for identifying spending patterns.
Returns latency metrics for event processing.
Returns event volume time-series data.
Returns run metrics grouped by job version to track version performance.
Returns side-by-side performance comparison across jobs.
Returns jobs ranked by total cost in the specified period.
Returns reliability metrics (success rate, MTTR, MTBF) for jobs.
Returns jobs with the highest failure rates in the specified period.
Returns historical execution data for a specific job.
Returns job execution performance metrics including p50/p95/p99 latencies.
Returns run counts grouped by trigger type (cron, API, event, webhook).
Returns a histogram of run durations across percentile buckets.
Returns the most common failure reasons across runs.
Returns aggregate summary statistics for runs in the specified period.
Returns time-series data of run executions bucketed by interval.
Returns cost data grouped by tag for cost allocation.
Returns aggregate metrics grouped by tag for resource categorization.
Returns tags associated with the highest failure rates.
Returns delivery success rates and latency metrics for webhooks.
Returns health metrics for webhook endpoints including error rates.
Returns webhook endpoints with the highest failure rates.
Returns completion and success rates for workflows.
Returns aggregate analytics across all workflows.
Returns average and percentile duration metrics for each step in a workflow.
Returns the anomaly detection configuration for the current project.

put.description: Sets or updates the anomaly detection thresholds for the current project.

get.description: Returns all API keys for the current project.

post.description: Creates a new API key for authenticating with the API.

get.description: Returns API keys that are expiring within the specified number of days.

delete.description: Permanently revokes an API key, immediately invalidating it.

post.description: Rotates an API key, generating a new secret while keeping the same ID.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of audit events for the current project.
Exports audit events as CSV or JSON for compliance and reporting.
Verifies the integrity of the audit event hash chain.
Returns a paginated list of batch operations and their progress.
Returns details and progress of a specific batch operation.
Checks whether the organization has reached its plan limits.

post.description: Creates a canary deployment to gradually shift traffic from one workflow version to another.
Initiates the device authorization flow by generating a device code and user code.
Polls for the authorization token after the user approves the device code.
Approves a pending device code, authorizing the CLI session.

get.description: Returns a cost estimate based on current usage patterns.
Returns a paginated list of deployment versions.

post.description: Creates a new deployment version for a workflow.
Finalizes a deployment version, locking its configuration.
Promotes a deployment version to active, routing traffic to it.
Rolls back to the previous deployment version.

get.description: Returns a preview of the impact of downgrading to a lower plan tier.
Returns all environments in the current project.

post.description: Creates a new environment for isolating job configurations.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an environment.

get.description: Returns details of a specific environment.
Returns the resolved environment variables with inheritance applied.
Returns all event sources configured in the current project.

post.description: Creates a new event source for receiving external events.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an event source and its subscriptions.

get.description: Returns details of a specific event source.

patch.description: Updates an existing event source's configuration.

post.description: Creates a subscription linking a job or workflow to an event source.

get.description: Returns all subscriptions for a specific event source.

delete.description: Removes a subscription from an event source.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of event triggers in the current project.

post.description: Dispatches an event that triggers matching subscriptions.
Sends an event to all triggers matching the given key prefix.
Purges completed or expired event triggers.

get.description: Returns aggregate statistics about event triggers.

delete.description: Cancels a waiting event trigger.

get.description: Returns details of a specific event trigger by its key.

post.description: Sends a payload to an event trigger, resolving it.

get.description: Opens an SSE stream for real-time updates on an event trigger.
Streams all job definitions for the current project as JSON or NDJSON.
Streams run history for the current project within a time window as JSON, NDJSON, or CSV.
Streams all workflow definitions for the current project as JSON or NDJSON.
Returns all job groups in the current project.

post.description: Creates a new group for organizing related jobs.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a job group. Jobs in the group are not deleted.

get.description: Returns details of a specific job group.

patch.description: Updates an existing job group's name or configuration.

get.description: Returns all jobs belonging to a specific job group.

post.description: Pauses all jobs belonging to a specific job group.
post.summary: Pause all jobs in a group

post.description: Resumes all paused jobs belonging to a specific job group.
post.summary: Resume all jobs in a group

get.description: Returns aggregate statistics for all jobs in a group.
Returns a paginated list of jobs in the current project.

post.description: Creates a new job with the specified endpoint and configuration.
Creates multiple jobs in a single request.
Disables multiple jobs in a single request.
Enables multiple jobs in a single request.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a job and all its associated data.

get.description: Returns details of a specific job.

post.description: Creates a copy of an existing job with a new name.

get.description: Returns all dependencies for a specific job.

post.description: Creates a dependency relationship between two jobs.

delete.description: Removes a dependency relationship between two jobs.

get.description: Returns deployments for a job in descending creation order.

post.description: Creates a deployment record and returns a presigned URL for uploading the source tarball.

get.description: Returns the current state of a code deployment, including build status and logs.

post.description: Verifies the tarball upload and triggers the container image build.

get.description: Returns stored build logs for terminal deployments. For in-progress builds, use ?stream=true to receive live logs as SSE (text/event-stream).

parameters.description: If true, open SSE stream for in-progress builds
parameters.name: stream

schema.description: If true, open SSE stream for in-progress builds

post.description: Sets an earlier ready deployment as the active one for the job.

get.description: Returns health metrics for a job including success rate and latency.

post.description: Pauses a job, preventing new runs from being dequeued while preserving queue state.
Resumes a paused job, allowing queued runs to be dequeued immediately.
Triggers immediate execution of a job.
Triggers multiple executions of a job with different payloads.

get.description: Returns all versions of a job definition showing configuration history.
Returns details of a specific job version.
Returns all log drains configured in the current project.

post.description: Creates a new log drain to forward job execution logs to an external destination.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a log drain.

get.description: Returns details of a specific log drain.

patch.description: Updates an existing log drain's configuration.

get.description: Returns all members and their roles in the current project.

post.description: Assigns a user to a role in the current project.
post.summary: Assign a member to a role

post.description: Assigns multiple users to roles in a single operation.

delete.description: Removes a user's role assignment from the current project.

get.description: Returns all notification channels in the current project.

post.description: Creates a new notification channel for receiving alerts about job events.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a notification channel.

get.description: Returns details of a specific notification channel.

patch.description: Updates an existing notification channel's configuration.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of notification delivery attempts.
Returns jobs across all projects in an organization.
Returns runs across all projects in an organization.
Returns all available plan tiers with their limits and pricing.
Returns the budget configuration for the current project.

put.description: Sets or updates the budget for the current project.

get.description: Returns all projects accessible by the current API key.

post.description: Creates a new project within an organization.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a project and all its associated resources.

get.description: Returns details of a specific project.
Opens an SSE stream for real-time updates on all project activity including job runs, workflow runs, and event triggers.
Returns the current settings for a project.

put.description: Updates the settings for a project.

get.description: Returns all available execution regions.
Returns all resource policies in the current project.

post.description: Creates a policy restricting access to specific resources by role.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a resource policy.

get.description: Returns all roles defined in the current project.

post.description: Creates a new custom role with the specified permissions.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a custom role. Members with this role lose its permissions.

get.description: Returns details of a specific role including its permissions.

patch.description: Updates an existing role's name or permissions.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of job runs.

post.description: Cancels multiple runs matching the provided IDs.
Cancels all active runs in the current project.
Replays multiple runs from the dead-letter queue.
Replays multiple runs matching the provided IDs.

get.description: Returns runs that have exhausted all retry attempts.

delete.description: Cancels a queued or executing run.

get.description: Returns details of a specific job run.
Returns all checkpoints saved during a run's execution.
Returns all child runs spawned by the specified run.

post.description: Enables or disables debug mode for a run, increasing log verbosity.

get.description: Returns a comprehensive debug bundle with all run data for troubleshooting.
Returns the status of all dependencies for a run.

post.description: Replays a single run from the dead-letter queue.

get.description: Returns the event log for a specific run.

delete.description: Clears the idempotency key for a run, allowing re-triggering.

get.description: Returns the parent-child lineage tree for a run.
Returns all structured outputs produced by a run.

post.description: Pauses an executing run at the next safe checkpoint.
Creates a new run with the same configuration as the original.
Reschedules a queued run to execute at a different time.

get.description: Returns resource utilization snapshots for a run.

post.description: Restarts a run from the beginning, discarding current progress.
Resumes a paused run from its last checkpoint.

get.description: Returns all key-value pairs in the run's state store.
Opens an SSE stream for real-time updates on a run's execution.
Returns stored LLM streaming chunks for a run.
Returns all tool calls made during a run's execution.
Returns resource usage records for a specific run.
Returns all secrets in the current project. Values are redacted.

post.description: Creates a new encrypted secret for use in job payloads.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a secret.

post.description: Creates the default system roles (admin, editor, viewer) if they do not exist.

get.description: Returns the current spending limit configuration.

put.description: Sets or updates the spending limit for the current project.

post.description: Issues a short-lived JWT for use as a query-param token in SSE endpoints.

get.description: Returns aggregate statistics for the current project including job and run counts.
Returns all tag policies in the current project.

post.description: Creates a policy restricting access based on resource tags.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a tag policy.

get.description: Returns usage anomaly alerts based on configured thresholds.
Returns the current billing period's usage metrics.
Returns email notification preferences for the organization.

put.description: Updates email notification preferences for the organization.

get.description: Exports usage data as CSV or JSON for external analysis.
Returns projected usage for the current billing period.
Returns historical usage data across billing periods.
Returns cost breakdown by project for the current billing period.
Returns a paginated list of webhook delivery attempts. Legacy endpoint, prefer /v1/webhooks/deliveries.

post.description: Retries a failed webhook delivery. Legacy endpoint, prefer /v1/webhooks/deliveries/{id}/retry.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of webhook delivery attempts.
Returns details of a specific webhook delivery attempt.

post.description: Replays a webhook delivery with the original payload.
Retries a failed webhook delivery attempt.

get.description: Returns all webhook subscriptions in the current project.

post.description: Creates a new webhook subscription to receive event notifications.

delete.description: Removes a webhook subscription, stopping further deliveries.

post.description: Rotates the HMAC signing secret for a webhook subscription with a grace period during which both old and new signatures are sent.
Sends a test payload to a webhook URL to verify connectivity.

get.description: Returns the workflow execution policy for a project.

put.description: Creates or updates the workflow execution policy for a project.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of workflow runs in the current project.

post.description: Cancels multiple workflow runs matching the provided filters.
Replays multiple workflow runs matching the provided filters.

delete.description: Cancels an active workflow run and all its pending steps.

get.description: Returns details of a specific workflow run including step statuses.
Returns a diff between two workflow runs highlighting status changes, duration differences, and steps present in only one run.

post.description: Triggers compensation for previously completed steps in reverse topological order. Only valid for failed or timed_out runs.

get.description: Returns the compensation plan for a workflow run without executing it. Shows which steps would be compensated and in what order.
Returns a full debug timeline with per-step status, timing, cost, input/output, and data flow between steps.
Returns a human-readable explanation of workflow run execution decisions.
Returns the execution graph for a workflow run with step statuses.
Returns the labels attached to a workflow run.

post.description: Pauses an active workflow run, preventing further steps from executing.
Resumes a paused workflow run.
Retries a failed workflow run from the beginning.

get.description: Returns all step runs for a specific workflow run.

post.description: Approves a workflow step that is waiting for manual approval.
Forces a workflow step to complete regardless of its current state.
Replays a workflow step and all of its downstream dependent steps.
Retries a failed workflow step.
Skips a pending workflow step and continues execution.

get.description: Returns a chronological timeline of events for a workflow run.
Returns a paginated list of workflows in the current project.

post.description: Creates a new workflow with step definitions and trigger configuration.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a workflow and all its associated runs.

get.description: Returns details of a specific workflow including its step definitions.

patch.description: Updates an existing workflow's configuration and step definitions. Set breaking_change to true to acknowledge a breaking update; an audit event is emitted when active runs exist on the previous version.

get.description: Returns the currently active versions for a workflow, including traffic splits.
Returns the current canary deployment status with version comparison metrics.

patch.description: Adjusts the traffic percentage for an active canary deployment.

post.description: Immediately rolls back a canary deployment to 0% target traffic.
Creates a copy of an existing workflow with a new name.
Validates a workflow execution without creating actual runs.

get.description: Returns the DAG representation of the workflow's step dependencies.

post.description: Generates an execution plan showing which steps will run and in what order.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of runs for a specific workflow.

post.description: Simulates a workflow run with mock data to preview step outcomes.
Triggers a new execution of the workflow.

get.description: Returns all versions of a workflow definition.
Returns the differences between two workflow versions.
Returns details of a specific workflow version.
Returns the impact analysis for a specific workflow version.
Returns the step definitions for a specific workflow version.
